item.title: Global cooperation!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: PTGDump: Neurospicy Memes for Spicy People
item.description:
Hello everyone! I'm not autistic, but this video always makes me laugh.
My day today.
Aw shit, I hope this isn't AI.
Ugh. When I told my parents I had ADHD, one of them responded "Oh, I think I do to a little bit!" And it wasn't the parent who *definitely* does.
p e o p l e
It's like my brain makes that old Macintosh "quack" sound and everything freezes up.
The best part of waking up is 20 mg of meth!
There is a parent at my kid's school who will just show up to rake the leaves and tend the gardens. He shows up to all the school board meetings with visual aids on how very specific processes could be improved. His emails are in all caps. He is amazing and we love him.
50% horny.
Sent this one to my wife. She thought it was funny, but not ha-ha funny.
OOOOOF
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
Paradise
Man, I wish I could poof out.
Thanks for reading! MV Edit: Whoo mama, this one got y'all talking! Happy to see it. Now show me your content channels! I want to highlight y'all! Hey, I've got a gaming channel on the YouTubes. It's growing, and I want to take as many Imgur content creators along with me as I can. If you have a channel you want to promote, be it Twitch, YouTube or otherwise, let me know! Send me a link and I'll promote you in a future dump.
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad

item.title: Dad jokes, but the family reactions are the true winners here

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 765
item.description:

23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: My discord buddy @rbeeseart paints awesome birds. Check out her posts for a bunch more and leave some love!
27 Man Tax: Liam Hemsworth
“It is the greatest of all mistakes to do nothing because you can only do little.” - Sydney Smith So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Representative Al Green's ejection from the 'State of the Union' has actually amplified his power, drawing parallels to when a Jedi is vanquished.
item.description: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2026/feb/24/al-green-sign-protest-state-of-union State of the Union Address had an unsettling tone, evoking the feeling of an authoritarian awards ceremony. The frequent mentions of 'military' and 'police' were spectacularly concerning, a grooming session for what's to come,reminiscent of 1936 Germany. The response now taking shape isn’t just political—it’s collective. It’s nurses, teachers, farmers, tech workers, seniors, immigrants—all rediscovering the power of us. Start simple: Register. Vote. Show up. Join a union and/or coalition. Back the fighters: •ACLU – Defending civil rights in every courtroom. •SEIU – Organizing service and care workers for fair pay. Indivisible – Mobilizing grassroots democracy advocates •NOW – Championing equality and reproductive justice. Public Citizen – Holding corporations and lobbyists accountable. •AFL‑CIO – Uniting workers across industries and states. •NEA – Standing up for public education and teachers. •MADRE – Advancing global women’s and human rights. •SPLC – Confronting hate groups and systemic injustice. •AARP – Fighting for dignity and security in aging. This is what democracy looks like when it remembers itself. The people who broke this economy think the rest of us will quietly adapt. They think despair is permanent. They think we’re too tired to resist. They’re wrong. Vote.gov anybody can get a mail-in ballot by saying they're sick. Call your County seat for a mail-in ballot. https://rbreich.com/ top right menu videos
item.dc:creator: Shawnofavitch

item.title: I had the opposite experience
item.description: Because I grew up in a strict household, music and movies were curated to match our values. I had to sneak in linkin park and staind into the house, and I frikking loved all the songs on hybrid theory and break the cycle. I bought both of those based on 1-2 songs. But the most disappointing album I bought was Paparoach, whatever album had Last Resort on it.

item.title: It's interesting to see how little the republican party has changed over the years.
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/streethymns Interesting at the end when she says "if anyone has the right to fight it's the Indians". Want to bet she's just saying that as an excuse, she did see the native Americans start standing up and demanding better treatment, then she wouldn't support them anymore. There's always a reason "people aren't doing it the right way", when they actually just don't want you to do it at all.
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Prince Harry: "Over the past year, I've had the honor and privilege of visiting Ukraine twice. Each time I left deeply moved by the courage, dignity and unbreakable spirit of the Ukrainian people."
item.description: "For four years, Ukraine has stood firm. You've shown the world what true resilience looks like. You reminded us all that freedom and independence are never guaranteed. They need protecting, defending, and when necessary, fighting for." – Prince Harry

item.title: Unique and funny memes that I totally did not steal in any way whatsoever
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
What kind of cookie was it?
It's true, actually.
Why is life so tedious sometimes?
Just kidding! You will only get one.
Me too
But one day a month, I'll be able to do it all in a breezy fashion
Sometimes
Such wholesome positivity
I've heard the flavor is based on a now extinct banana
I'm actually from a family that's artistic on both sides, but they all encouraged me. It's wonderful to be encouraged to be creative.
Gotta have my fan, music, bed cooler mat, five blankets, my special pillow, my eye cover, and many other things
I just love this
Who knew birds were mean? I have a friend who is terrified of birds because she got attacked by a flock of them.
I have a cat like this
Literally happened to me. Found six bags of pancake mix in my cabinet.
We're just coworkers
I think it's nice
Yes. It's pretty much that.
Earth, the only frontier in which we can survive
Yeeeeesssss
Found a dollar on the ground at church last week. Thank you, Jesus!
What color even is chocolate sparkle?
It's true
It's controversial, but I like it without the box
I like bromo
Mmmmm
Would wear
Believe in your worth
I can do it
Happy winter weather!
Gorgeous
I don't fold laundry
Imagine paying to look this mad
Be a dandelion
Let's see if they work!
My brain is the clutter
You like me? Why? What do you want from me?
Lucky
It's my favorite one
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Netflix Board Member speaks out
item.description: Trump says that the government was controlling the media and conspiring against him and here he is doing the exact same thing he said he was fighting against. *typical lying Trump* So much for free speech absolutism, huh? Pretty sure that’s only a “trigger phrase” to make people think that they actually care about liberty, they like freedom for “me” not free freedom for “thee” Can’t “both sides” this crap anymore.
item.dc:creator: wafflesdidit

item.title: Kay Rose is exactly where she’s meant to be
item.description:
A few weeks ago I posted about KK, aka Kay Rose, who was the longest resident of the GHHS. She had been in a cage for over a year
@TrustInButtsMcGee messaged me almost immediately that she wanted to adopt her.
Our humane society CEO Spencer (@AlabamaAnimalRescuer) flew her all the way from Alabama to Colorado to go to her forever home
Her new mama has kept me informed about how well she’s doing
Apparently she is a purr baby who loves snuggles??
She came with some baggage, but her new mama is very well equipped to deal with it. KK is exactly where she was meant to be
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: GovBrief Today #390
item.description: The longest State of the Union address in American history lasted over two hours. Donald Trump talked about children when they were useful to him, parading stories of kids he claimed were hurt by immigrants and transgender policies. He never mentioned the ones his government is hurting. Unaccompanied immigrant children are being threatened with jail and told the government will go after their families if they don't sign documents giving up their legal rights. This happens before they ever reach the shelters where federal law guarantees them attorneys and judges. Legal advocates filed an emergency petition today to stop it. These are children alone in the U.S., and the government is racing to deport them before anyone with a law degree can say hello. Trump also never spoke about the children whose abuse is detailed in the Epstein files. A new analysis found that over 90 FBI interview records are missing from the DOJ's document release. Three are connected to a child who says Epstein abused her and who also accused Trump of sexual assault. With Trump it's always what he doesn't say that matters most. We've emailed 6,300+ stories over 390 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. The email subscription is free. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/france-kushner-call [2] https://go.govbrief.today/hhs-vaccine-lawsuit [3] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-files-missing [4] https://go.govbrief.today/anthropic-friday [5] https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-kelly-appeal [6] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-sues-ucla [7] https://go.govbrief.today/reporter-devices [8] https://go.govbrief.today/judiciary-congress [9] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-usps-lower [10] https://go.govbrief.today/immigrants-irs-ruling [11] https://go.govbrief.today/nj-ice-lawsuit [12] https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-sued-minors [13] https://go.govbrief.today/bank-citizenship-rule [14] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-sotu [15] https://go.govbrief.today/gonzales-refuses-resign [16] https://go.govbrief.today/house-av-bill [17] https://go.govbrief.today/green-protest-sotu Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Ian McKellen reads a poem called The First Letter to the Corinthians. It was written by Artur Dron, Ukrainian Defender, writer, poet.
item.description: "Love digs trenches and lives in them, gnawing on ice from a hacked up plastic bottle. When it suffers thirst at minus 20, love goes out on combat duty, enters firing positions with hernias, fever, prostatitis, with vast concussions, asthma, and allergies, with a high probability of not making it back."
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Aww
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: Scorpions farms exist. Each scorpion produces about 2 milligrams of venom daily, which is milked using a pair of tweezers and tongs. A liter is worth up to $39 million, used for cosmetics and medicines
item.description: Up to $39 million per liter ($10,300,000 per quart). Because the yield per animal is so microscopic, it would take roughly 2.6 million milkings to fill a single gallon.
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9
